title: Love, Lattes, and the Christmas Lights
original_title: Love, Lattes, and the Christmas Lights
overview: Sophie meets real estate developer, Ethan who is tasked with buying out the shopping precinct where Sophie runs her struggling coffee shop. They find themselves thrown together to organize the annual Christmas lights event.
